root_text.an3.153:1.2: asucinā kāyakammena, asucinā vacīkammena, asucinā manokammena …pe….
root_text.an3.153:2.2: sucinā kāyakammena, sucinā vacīkammena, sucinā manokammena—
root_text.an3.153:2.3: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito viyatto sappuriso akkhataṁ anupahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, anavajjo ca hoti ananuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca puññaṁ pasavatī”ti.

translation_text.an3.153:1.1: “When a foolish, incompetent untrue person has three qualities they keep themselves broken and damaged. …
translation_text.an3.153:1.2: Impure deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …
translation_text.an3.153:2.1: When an astute, competent true person has three qualities they keep themselves intact and unscathed. …
translation_text.an3.153:2.2: Pure deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …”
